order_number.orig_str: शासन शुध्दीपत्रक क्रमांकः सुप्रमा-२०२४/प्र.क्र.२२४/ पापु ९१३ (E Office No ११०३३३६)

para_trans: Under the "Jal Jeevan Mission Programme," Md. Regarding grant of revised administrative approval to the budget of Baigaon subdivision Deulgaon Raja tap water supply scheme.
Government Sanitation Card No: Suprama-2024 / P.No.224 / Papu 93 (7 Office No.1903336) 7th Floor, Gokuldas Tejpal Hospital Complex,
Lokmanya Tilak Marg, Mantralaya, Mumbai - Yoo 0019
Government Decision No.Suprama-2024 / P.No.224 / Papu 913, D. 28.05.2025

Under the "Jal Jeevan Mission," Md. Baigaon subdivision of Deulgaon Raja tap water supply scheme is under the purview of the department. The price in line 3 of the Government Decision dated 28.05.2025 is Rs. 97,50,280 - (Rupees ninety nine lakhs fifty thousand two hundred and eighty only) instead of "Rs. 88.87 lakh (Rupees eighty-eight lakh AAC thousand) "should be read as" only. "
R. This Government decision is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
